overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from an underwater exploration game (Subnautica), showing the player swimming through a dark bioluminescent cave system. The player navigates through green glowing flora, experiences a bright particle flash transition, then moves through an area with large purple bioluminescent orbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underwater cave tunnel with bioluminescent flora

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through a narrow underwater cave passage surrounded by dense green bioluminescent plants

entered.detail: dark rocky cave wall forming the boundary of the underwater tunnel
clusters of glowing green aquatic flora illuminating the dark cave

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a narrow enclosed underwater cave tunnel. Dense green bioluminescent plants line the passage, providing the only light in the dark water. The cave walls are visible in the distance as the player moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition chamber with particle explosion effects

events.description: bright white particle explosion occurs, transitioning the environment from green flora to purple bioluminescent orbs

agents.ego_description: swimming through a bright flash transition as the cave environment changes dramatically

entered.detail: bright white explosive particle effect temporarily illuminating the scene
large spherical purple bioluminescent objects appearing in the distance

segments.scene_description: A sudden bright white particle explosion illuminates the cave as the player swims forward. The green plants disappear behind as large purple glowing orbs come into view in the distance, marking a transition to a different biome.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underwater cavern with giant bioluminescent orbs

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through a field of large floating purple bioluminescent spheres

entered.detail: massive textured purple glowing sphere floating close to the left side
large spherical purple bioluminescent object on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player swims among giant purple bioluminescent orbs that fill the cavern space. The white particles from the previous flash have dissipated, leaving only the soft purple glow of the large floating spheres. The cave walls remain visible in the periphery as the player navigates through the orb field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey through a dark cave system that transforms from a green bioluminescent tunnel into a cavern filled with purple glowing spheres. It begins with the camera swimming through a narrow passage lined with dense green flora that provides the sole source of light against the dark water. As the player moves forward, a sudden explosion of bright white particles illuminates the space, masking the green plants as the environment shifts. The scene then opens into a wider cavern where the white particles dissipate to reveal a field of giant purple bioluminescent orbs. The camera finally navigates through these floating spheres, with the cave walls remaining visible in the periphery under the soft purple glow.
